examples: Wonderfully melodic and tuneful, his songs have made me weep.
Singing without the sound of tuneful strings;
Of, relating to, or containing a pleasing succession of sounds; tuneful .
He says the group's songs are tuneful and their music is basically word-based.
Since Eels' debut album in 1996, Everett has made moody rock music with rough edges and tuneful melodies.
